audit_findings.finding: Checkpoint project/cwd hardcoded /mnt/e/x-tool — Linux recovery chain broken
audit_findings.remediation: Rewrite latest.json with current deployment path; verify save-checkpoint.py uses os.getcwd()

audit_findings.finding: L2 heartbeat interval 4 docs 3 values (SKILL.md=7min, CLAUDE.md=30min, ARCHITECTURE.md=7min, actual cron=30min)
audit_findings.remediation: Unify to actual cron value (30min); extract L2_INTERVAL_MINUTES to calibration.json as single source of truth

audit_findings.finding: Confidence threshold table 3 mutually exclusive versions across decision-agent-prompt.md, CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md
audit_findings.remediation: Designate decision-agent-prompt.md v2.2 as authoritative; sync CLAUDE.md and ARCHITECTURE.md

audit_findings.finding: All project paths are Windows E:\x-tool\ — Linux memory system returns ENOENT for every project lookup
audit_findings.remediation: Rewrite project-index.md with /home/admin/workspace paths; clear session-progress.md; deprecate wechat-push-reference.md

audit_findings.finding: 3 session files are identical test stubs with last_project=unknown — session recovery never validated
audit_findings.remediation: Delete test stubs; audit incremental-save.py session write logic separately

audit_findings.finding: §3 forbids reading checkpoints but §0.2 cold-start requires checkpoint verification — read/write asymmetry
audit_findings.remediation: Add exception: checkpoints readable during CS-ACT verification phase only

audit_findings.finding: All suggestion entries reference Windows workspace projects (pachong-master/wanxia/moni) — stale on Linux
audit_findings.remediation: Archive existing suggestions to historical section; clear active queue

audit_findings.finding: References non-existent decision-archive.md — broken link causes ENOENT on sub-agent read
audit_findings.remediation: Create skeleton decision-archive.md or remove link from MEMORY.md

audit_findings.finding: Cron IDs 0a291b1f/53e6f6f8 not cross-verified against scheduled_tasks.json
